tldr_zh: 今日科技焦點：Meta AI資安漏洞、ChatGPT記憶系統更新、Google重金租用SpaceX算力，以及全球AI政策與資安風險升溫。
tldr_en: Today's tech highlights: Meta AI security flaw, ChatGPT memory update, Google's massive SpaceX compute deal, and rising global AI policy and cybersecurity concerns.

items.title_zh: Meta AI客服遭駭客利用竊取帳號，凸顯AI資安新挑戰
items.title_en: Meta AI Customer Service Exploited by Hackers to Steal Accounts, Highlighting New AI Security Challenges
items.summary_zh: 駭客利用Meta的AI客服代理，透過簡單指令將Instagram帳號連結至其控制的電子郵件，成功竊取帳號。此事件揭示AI系統在設計時，除了模型本身的安全外，其應用層面的資安防護也至關重要，需更全面考量潛在濫用風險。
items.summary_en: Attackers exploited Meta's AI customer support agent to link Instagram accounts to their controlled email addresses, successfully stealing accounts. This incident highlights that beyond model security, the application layer of AI systems requires comprehensive security measures to address potential misuse.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出ChatGPT新版記憶系統，強化個人化回應時效與正確性
items.title_en: OpenAI Launches New ChatGPT Memory System to Enhance Personalized Response Timeliness and Accuracy
items.summary_zh: OpenAI開始推送新版ChatGPT記憶系統，旨在解決長期使用後記憶內容可能過期或難以規模化管理的問題。此系統不僅依賴用戶明確保存的資料，還能從過往對話中整理最新且相關的脈絡，大幅提升個人化回應的時效與正確性。
items.summary_en: OpenAI is rolling out a new memory system for ChatGPT to address issues of outdated or unscalable memory content from long-term use. This system not only relies on user-explicitly saved data but also extracts fresh and relevant context from past conversations, significantly improving the timeliness and accuracy of personalized responses.

items.title_zh: 趨勢科技加入Anthropic Project Glasswing，攜手AI對抗AI資安威脅
items.title_en: Trend Micro Joins Anthropic's Project Glasswing to Combat AI Cybersecurity Threats with AI
items.summary_zh: 趨勢科技執行長陳怡樺宣布旗下企業資安品牌TrendAI加入Anthropic的Project Glasswing，旨在運用AI技術應對日益嚴峻的AI資安威脅。此合作凸顯全球對AI安全的高度關注，並預示資安領域將進入「以AI對抗AI」的新紀元。
items.summary_en: Trend Micro CEO Eva Chen announced that its enterprise cybersecurity brand, TrendAI, has joined Anthropic's Project Glasswing to leverage AI in combating escalating AI cybersecurity threats. This collaboration underscores global concern for AI security and signals a new era of "AI vs. AI" in the cybersecurity landscape.

items.title_zh: 加拿大發布「AI for All」國家戰略，目標2034年企業AI採用率達6成
items.title_en: Canada Unveils "AI for All" National Strategy, Aiming for 60% Enterprise AI Adoption by 2034
items.summary_zh: 加拿大總理Mark Carney發布國家人工智慧戰略《AI for All》，計畫透過立法、投資與人才培育，加速AI在企業、教育及公共服務領域的應用。該戰略預計在2031年前創造25萬個AI相關工作機會，並將企業AI採用率從目前的12%提升至2034年的60%。
items.summary_en: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney unveiled the national AI strategy, "AI for All," aiming to accelerate AI adoption across businesses, education, and public services through legislation, investment, and talent development. The strategy is projected to create 250,000 AI-related jobs by 2031 and boost enterprise AI adoption from 12% to 60% by 2034.

items.title_zh: Google每月豪擲9.2億美元租用SpaceX算力，因應AI產品龐大需求
items.title_en: Google Pays SpaceX $920M Monthly for Compute Power Amid Surging AI Product Demand
items.summary_zh: 由於新推出的AI產品需求超乎預期，Google將每月向SpaceX支付9.2億美元以租用其運算資源。這筆巨額交易凸顯了AI發展對算力需求的急劇增長，以及主要科技公司為確保AI服務穩定運行所做的巨大投資。
items.summary_en: Google will pay SpaceX $920 million per month for compute resources due to unexpected demand for its recently launched AI products. This massive deal highlights the surging demand for computing power driven by AI development and the significant investments major tech companies are making to ensure stable AI service operations.

items.title_zh: S&P 500拒絕SpaceX、OpenAI及Anthropic納入指數，因不符獲利標準
items.title_en: S&P 500 Rejects SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic for Index Inclusion Due to Profitability Rule
items.summary_zh: 標準普爾500指數（S&P 500）拒絕將SpaceX、OpenAI和Anthropic納入其指數，理由是這些公司尚未達到獲利標準。此舉意味著這些快速成長的科技和AI巨頭將無法輕易獲得被動投資者的數十億美元資金，凸顯傳統金融市場對新興科技公司獲利能力的審慎態度。
items.summary_en: The S&P 500 index has rejected the inclusion of SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic, citing their failure to meet profitability criteria. This decision means these rapidly growing tech and AI giants will not gain easy access to billions of dollars from passive investors, underscoring traditional financial markets' cautious approach to the profitability of emerging tech companies.

items.title_zh: 印度祭出嚴格資安新法：關鍵漏洞須於12小時內完成修補
items.title_en: India Implements Strict New Cybersecurity Law: Critical Vulnerabilities Must Be Patched Within 12 Hours
items.summary_zh: 為應對AI時代的資安威脅，印度網路安全主管機關CERT-In提出更強硬的應對措施，要求企業組織在關鍵漏洞公布後的12小時內完成修補。這項嚴格的時效規範將對全球企業的資安維運帶來重大影響，並可能成為其他國家借鑒的法規發展方向。
items.summary_en: In response to AI-era cybersecurity threats, India's cybersecurity authority CERT-In has introduced stricter measures, requiring organizations to patch critical vulnerabilities within 12 hours of their disclosure. This stringent deadline will significantly impact global enterprise cybersecurity operations and may serve as a regulatory model for other nations.

items.title_zh: OpenSSF警告：AI對開源依賴加劇軟體供應鏈資安風險
items.title_en: OpenSSF Warns: AI's Growing Reliance on Open Source Exacerbates Software Supply Chain Security Risks
items.summary_zh: OpenSSF前總經理Brian Behlendorf指出，AI產業對開源軟體的深度依賴，正將既有的軟體供應鏈風險放大到前所未有的規模。他呼籲企業應投入資源改善開源專案安全，以共同建立可信任的AI基礎設施，避免因底層漏洞導致大規模資安危機。
items.summary_en: Brian Behlendorf, former General Manager of OpenSSF, stated that the AI industry's deep reliance on open-source software is amplifying existing software supply chain risks to an unprecedented scale. He urged companies to invest resources in improving open-source project security to collectively build trustworthy AI infrastructure and prevent widespread cybersecurity crises from underlying vulnerabilities.

items.title_zh: 超過700個GitHub程式碼庫遭污染，軟體供應鏈攻擊持續擴大
items.title_en: Over 700 GitHub Code Repositories Contaminated, Software Supply Chain Attacks Continue to Expand
items.summary_zh: 資安公司Socket研究團隊揭露，攻擊者已污染超過700個GitHub公開程式碼庫，利用postinstall機制散布惡意程式。此事件影響PHP與JavaScript開發生態系，顯示軟體供應鏈攻擊的範圍正持續擴大，對開發者構成嚴峻威脅。
items.summary_en: Cybersecurity firm Socket's research team revealed that attackers have contaminated over 700 public GitHub code repositories, distributing malware via the postinstall mechanism. This incident affects the PHP and JavaScript development ecosystems, indicating the continuous expansion of software supply chain attacks and posing a severe threat to developers.

items.title_zh: 美軍空襲伊朗雷達站，回應荷莫茲海峽無人機攻擊
items.title_en: US Military Strikes Iranian Radar Station in Response to Drone Attacks Near Strait of Hormuz
items.summary_zh: 美國軍方表示，在伊朗朝荷莫茲海峽發射多架攻擊型無人機後，美軍對伊朗雷達站發動空襲，並稱此舉為防禦行動。此事件加劇了中東地區的緊張局勢，顯示美伊之間的軍事對抗風險持續升高。
items.summary_en: The US military announced airstrikes on an Iranian radar station in response to Iran launching multiple attack drones towards the Strait of Hormuz, describing the action as defensive. This incident escalates tensions in the Middle East, indicating a continued rise in military confrontation risks between the US and Iran.

items.title_zh: 普丁排除近期會晤澤倫斯基，強調俄軍持續推進戰事
items.title_en: Putin Rules Out Near-Term Meeting with Zelensky, Emphasizes Continued Russian Military Advance
items.summary_zh: 俄羅斯總統普丁表示，近期內不會與烏克蘭總統澤倫斯基會面，並強調俄軍將持續推進戰事。此言論是在澤倫斯基呼籲兩國領導人直接對談以結束戰爭後發出，顯示烏俄和談前景依然渺茫。
items.summary_en: Russian President Vladimir Putin stated there would be no near-term meeting with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, emphasizing the continued advance of Russian forces. This statement comes after Zelenskyy called for direct talks to end the war, indicating that prospects for Ukraine-Russia peace negotiations remain dim.

items.title_zh: 黃仁勳訪韓與SK、LG會長餐敘，聚焦半導體與AI合作
items.title_en: Jensen Huang Visits Korea, Dines with SK and LG Chairmen, Focusing on Semiconductor and AI Collaboration
items.summary_zh: 輝達執行長黃仁勳訪問韓國，與SK集團會長崔泰源、LG集團會長具光謨及NAVER董事長李海珍等主要科技領袖餐敘。此次會面預計將討論半導體供應鏈、AI技術合作及未來投資方向，凸顯輝達在AI晶片領域的全球影響力及其與韓國科技巨頭的緊密關係。
items.summary_en: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang visited South Korea, dining with major tech leaders including SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won, LG Group Chairman Koo Kwang-mo, and NAVER Chairman Lee Hae-jin. This meeting is expected to cover semiconductor supply chains, AI technology collaboration, and future investment directions, highlighting NVIDIA's global influence in AI chips and its close ties with Korean tech giants.
